title: MCP Trust Registry — Session Receipt
description: Schema for a verifier-signed receipt emitted at MCP session end, per protocol v0.1 §11.3. Provides downstream-auditable evidence that 'this client, against this policy, ran this server under this enforcement'. Receipt format is interoperable with X-Hub Hub Receipt; the two MAY be the same artifact in practice.

session_id.description: Verifier-assigned session identifier, prefixed 'rcpt-' followed by 6-32 lowercase hex chars.

verifier_key_id.description: Key id of the verifier that produced this receipt (NOT the publisher's key).

capability_denials.description: Count of host-resource accesses blocked by capability enforcement during this session.

policy_hash.description: Hash of the policy active during this session.

signature.description: ed25519 signature over the canonical form of this document with the 'signature' field removed.

denial_summary.description: Optional per-capability denial counts. Aggregate only; per-event detail lives in the audit log (§11.2).
